holdings.n: Dws Govt Money Market Series Institutional Shares

holdings.infoBox: KOKU is an equity ETF with a total of 1137 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 5.59%, Apple at 5.05%, Microsoft at 3.25%, Amazon.com at 2.73%, and Alphabet at 2.47%.

overview.description: The Xtrackers MSCI Kokusai Equity ETF (KOKU) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI Kokusai (World ex Japan) index. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of large- and mid-cap developed market stocks outside of Japan. KOKU was launched on Apr 8, 2020 and is issued by Xtrackers.
